name: Leone Abbacchio
alt_names: レオーネ・アバッキオ
description:
__Height__: 188
__Nationality__: Italian
__Stand__: Moody Blues
__Occupation__: Passione Soldato, Police Officer

Leone Abbacchio is a fictional character from the Japanese manga JoJo's Bizarre Adventure. Abbacchio is one of the heroes of part 5, a part of Bruno's gang. Abbacchio was a cop once. His dream was to protect people. Then one day, one of the police died protecting him. From then on, he has no hope of living and decided to join the gang.  Moody Blues can repeat the past of anything or any person. Moody Blues becomes an easy target for enemy to attack since it cannot attack when it's doing the "rebroadcasting". Once it is out of the "rebroadcasting", it can attack again.  (Source: Wikipedia)
